name: Sad Virus Foodland
short_description: Walking simulation and adventure game where player controls virus character in foodland. Mission to avoid obstacles and find beer bottle
detailed_description:
STORY:

Player controls sad Virus character in this 3rd person walking simulation and platformer game. Sad virus is now at foodland where is different food items like donuts,steak,hot dogs etc. Player mission is to avoid obsctacles, make accurate jumps and avoid falling from track. End of level is beer bottle which finish game and make virus again happy. So can you finish tricky obstacles and find beer bottle

FEATURES:

  • Try to finish hard foodland track and find beer bottle in the end of level

  • Beautiful foodland and several obstacles, like moving donuts, moving platforms etc
